text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: That reminds me... When it's nighttime, they start to come out around here...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Yes... Let's leave before we disturb them...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We quickly get ready to leave, but just as we're
about to...
Haaah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I know that voice!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Greetings, my wonderful audience! I thank you for
gathering to see me on this fine evening!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, allow me to begin! This is an opera created
by, intended for, and belonging to yours truly,
the Overlord!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Oh no! Opera O is surrounded!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Yes, and they are not very friendly... Let's go.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Opera O!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh? How do you do, Cafe? Have you come to
watch my opera practice?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Well, not exactly. How should I put this...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Telling the truth could do more harm than good.
We wouldn't want to frighten Opera O. What
should we do?
choice_data_list: Play it cool so she doesn't get spooked.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Okay.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Opera O, you are currently surrounded. They have come...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: They are like thoughts, invisible to the naked eye. And they are not friendly, so we should leave as soon as possible...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The ever-optimistic T.M. Opera O looks
uncharacteristically surprised. However...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha! Splendid!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It appears my charm has allured quite a large
audience!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Then I shall sing! For those who exist beyond the
physical realm! All of you, applaud your overlord!
Overlord! Overlord!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: But how... They're... enjoying this?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A true overlord must welcome audiences of any
and all kinds! Whether the spectators possess a
physical form matters not!
Overlord! Overlord! Praise be to the Overlord!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Oh my... Their voices are getting louder, flowing
in like a rushing river...
Overlord! Overlord! Overlord!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Overlord... Overlord!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Cafe, have you been bewitched by my charms as
well? Splendid!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: The passion they have is irresistible! I must shout with them!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
O, Overlord! Glory to the Overlord! Glory to the
Overlord!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like their zeal was enough to enthrall
Manhattan Cafe. She continues to chant the
Overlord's praises until we leave the area...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Okay... I'll try that out.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Opera O, it's almost curfew. Would you like to
head back with me?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, would you look at the time! Very well, I
accept your offer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, the three of us set off home. However...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: This isn't good... We're being followed...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Yes, T.M. Opera O in particular...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: If she were to look back now, they would have her forever...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
By the way, Cafe, I would love to hear your
thoughts on my performance just now.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: No! Don't look this—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Hraaagh!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Phew... It worked...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Cafe? Is there something over there?!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: No... Just keep your eyes forward please!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! I'm not sure why you insist, but
that regal pose of yours is truly a delight to
behold!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Well, as long as you're safe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe might be exhausted from the
ordeal, but she manages to keep T.M. Opera O
safe and sound!
